notes: Source of truth for the item editor (helm tab). Tile paths are relative to the DCSS tile pack root (dcss/Dungeon Crawl Stone Soup Full/). DCSS base types from item-prop.cc: hat AC 0, helmet AC 1. Hats are tinkerier (more ego variety, lower DEF); helmets are heavier and crit-shrugging.

skullcap.label: Skullcap
skullcap.flavor: Improvised head protection. Small DEF, light HP.

cap.label: Cap
cap.flavor: Padded cloth or leather cap. Tinkery — favors affix slots over raw DEF.

wizard_hat.label: Wizard Hat
wizard_hat.flavor: Pointed mage hat. Future: mana/regen synergy.

helmet.label: Helmet
helmet.flavor: Hardened steel. Higher DEF, fewer ego slots.

crown.label: Crown
crown.flavor: Royal regalia. End-game flavor; large stat band.

fortified.desc: Future: flat damage reduction vs bosses. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

stealth.desc: Future: lower aggro range. Currently: Agility affix bonus.

vision.desc: Future: extended fog reveal radius. Currently: no bonus.

wisdom.desc: Future: bonus XP gain. Currently: no bonus.

warding.desc: Future: chance to negate damage. Currently: Agility affix bonus.

regen.desc: Future: HP regen scales with tier. Currently: Regen affix bonus.

willpower.desc: Future: magic resistance. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

lordly.desc: Future: nearby allies inspired. Currently: Strength affix bonus.

elemental.desc: Future: elemental resistance. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

psychic.desc: Future: see-invisible (no enemy stealth). Currently: no bonus.

drop_weight_schema: Array of 5 weights [T1,T2,T3,T4,T5] — relative probability this item appears in the loot pool for each dungeon tier.

items.name: Battered Skullcap
items.lore: Dented in too many places to count.

items.name: Leather Cap
items.lore: Soft leather. Better than nothing.

items.name: Iron Skullcap
items.lore: Cold iron. Better than soft leather.

items.name: Padded Coif
items.lore: Quilted layers absorb the worst of it.

items.name: Plumed Helm
items.lore: A flourish that announces a fight.

items.name: Ranger's Hood
items.lore: Drawn close, the wearer's face becomes weather.

items.name: Kettle Helm
items.lore: A common soldier's helm. Practical to a fault.

items.name: Crested Helm
items.lore: Worn by sergeants who outlived their lieutenants.

items.name: Elven Leather Helm
items.lore: So light you forget it isn't your own scalp.

items.name: Etched Helm
items.lore: The runes don't quite stay still in lamplight.

items.name: Knight's Helm
items.lore: Heavy and hot. Worth it when the blow comes.

items.name: Visored Basinet
items.lore: All eyes, no expression. Effective.

items.name: Wizard's Hat
items.lore: Only the truly wise wear something this silly.

items.name: Champion's Helm
items.lore: Worn by those who finished the tournament.

items.name: Warlord's Visor
items.lore: It looks at the battlefield differently.

items.name: Spectre's Cowl
items.lore: Cold cloth. Things see less of you while you wear it.

items.name: Dragonbone Helm
items.lore: Carved from a wyrm too old to remember its hatchling name.

items.name: Mage-Bound Helm
items.lore: The bindings hum when spells fly nearby.

items.name: King's Diadem
items.lore: Worn while signing the order to attack.

items.name: Crystal Crown
items.lore: It refracts more than light.

items.name: Halo of Ascension
items.lore: Rests just above the head. Doesn't ask permission.

items.name: Hat of Pondering
items.lore: It thinks for you. You don't always agree.

items.name: Cornuthaum
items.lore: The Wizard's Hat. The W is implied.

items.name: Helm of the Dragon
items.lore: Worn by the last knight to challenge the wyrm. Briefly worn by the wyrm afterward.

items.name: Crown of Dyrovepreva
items.lore: It remembers every order it ever wore.

items.name: Helm of the High Council
items.lore: Six hands forged it. Five of them disagreed.

items.name: Jester's Cap
items.lore: Bells included. They jingle even on the dead.

items.name: Green Mask
items.lore: The mask sees what the wearer hasn't. Yet.

items.name: Visor of the Watchman
items.lore: It sees in the dark. It sees the dark.

items.name: Helm of the Thane
items.lore: Worn by mountain-thanes who never quite died.

items.name: Helm of the Warden
items.lore: Issued to the lieutenants of the gate. Returned, mostly.

items.name: Hat of the Archmage
items.lore: Pointier than the regulation hat. Worn by the difficult professors.

items.name: Maxwell's Etheric Cage
items.lore: An armor that holds its wearer in place. Spells slide off the bars.
Hard to see in dim light, even when held directly before you.
items.name: Shadowed Green Mask

items.lore: Shaped from the long bones of something old. It still aches in the cold.
items.name: Bone Crown of Dyrovepreva

items.lore: Plain forged iron, but heavier than the metal alone explains.
items.name: Ironclad Etched Helm

items.lore: Shaped from the long bones of something old. It still aches in the cold.
items.name: Bone Hat of Pondering

items.lore: Shaped from the long bones of something old. It still aches in the cold.
items.name: Bone Wizard's Hat

items.lore: Volcanic glass, edge-flaked razor-sharp by patient hands.
items.name: Obsidian Crown of Dyrovepreva
Horn-Bound Helm
items.lore: The skull beneath remembers older wars. Charging is a virtue.

items.name: Sky-Striker Beak Helm
items.lore: The first stroke is the one that breaks the sky.

items.name: Ashen Crown
items.lore: Worn by every demonspawn who outlived their patron.

items.name: Psyche's Holy Censer
items.lore: Smolders eternally. Psyche believed the smoke kept her sane. It did not.

items.name: Tiamat's Five Heads
items.lore: Five heads. Five jaws. Five voices, none quieting.

items.name: Basalt Visor
items.lore: Cooled lava cut and bound. Heavier than the wearer's head.

items.name: Helm of the Bone Chamber
items.lore: Crowned the most important mound. The chamber accepts no others.
